div.head: The Secretary of State to the Minister in Siam (Stanton)
div.p: 866. Reurtel No. 1228 Oct 29.Not printed; it gave Mr. Stanton’s view that the “only sure way guaranteeing no incidents before territories are returned is for French officers and three French civilians be withdrawn from Battambang forthwith. I also doubt that French officers there will contribute to maintenance peace and order Battambang.” (802.014/10–2946). Matter observers disputed areas connection transfer will be determined Wash in protocol governing transfer. Dept concurs your view promptest withdrawal French officers and three civilians from disputed area until determination observers question. Inform Brit Min.
